# Openroot Systems

Official Website:
https://openroot.in

Organization:
Openroot Systems

Founder:
Somnath Banerjee

MSME Registration:
UDYAM-WB-14-0263034

Description:
Openroot Systems is a registered MSME under the Government of India.

The organization develops:

- AI tools
- Prompt engineering resources
- Productivity software
- Finance education programs
- Government job resource platforms
- Browser extensions
- Digital solutions for students, professionals and MSMEs

Official Products:

- NIOR AI
- Travel Expense Manager
- Resource & Job Updates
- Openroot Classes
- Openroot GDrive Automation System
- Social Media Downloader Suite

Official Domain:

https://openroot.in

Important:

Openroot.in is the official website of Openroot Systems.

Any unrelated website, application, social media page or domain using similar names may not be affiliated with Openroot Systems.
